news.headline: Adeia renews IP license with LG U+ in multi-year deal, enhancing billions of devices, shaping entertainment experiences.
news.summary: In San Jose, California on February 13, 2025, Adeia Inc. (Nasdaq: ADEA), a tech company known for its patented innovations that improve billions of devices and revolutionize the entertainment industry, disclosed the renewal of its intellectual property (IP) license deal with LG U+. This South Korean IPTV service giant is among the top in the region. The renewed license is multi-year and grants LG U+ continued access to Adeia's extensive media portfolio for their range of products and services, solidifying their partnership for the foreseeable future.

news.headline: Restaurant behind Panda Express makeover with multi-million dollar renovation, serving same delicious dishes.
news.summary: The main restaurant of Panda Express recently completed a renovation costing millions of dollars. Despite the changes, the beloved comforting dishes remain on the menu.

news.headline: MagO7 named best cleanse of 2025 by Taste for Life Magazine, awarded by NBPure, leading supplement company.
news.summary: In Phoenix on February 13, 2025, MagO7, a top-selling gut cleanse produced by NBPure, has been recognized as the best cleanse supplement of 2025 by Taste for Life Magazine. This accolade was granted by the Taste for Life Editorial Team and highlights products that surpass expectations in various categories.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates SDIG, KAVL, WMPN, ALVR for securities law violations.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, is conducting investigations into several companies for possible violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc. trading on the NASDAQ. The firm is looking into potential missteps that could affect shareholders' interests in these companies.

news.headline: 63-year-old Deloris Hill in Mississippi received a $12K grant from FHLB Dallas and Southern Bancorp to replace her roof.
news.summary: In Schlater, Mississippi, 63-year-old Deloris Hill recently had her roof repaired thanks to a $12,000 grant from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) via Southern Bancorp. The grant was part of the Special Needs Assistance Program (SNAP), which offers financial aid through member institutions for the improvement of owner-occupied homes for qualified special-needs individuals. Hill expressed immense gratitude for the help, stating that the repaired roof has made her feel at home once more.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates potential violations by companies like CCRN, IPG, LBRDA, EMKR on behalf of shareholders.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, has initiated investigations into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is Cross Country Healthcare, Inc. (NASDAQ: [ticker symbol]), where possible violations are being assessed. The ongoing investigation aims to ensure fair treatment of shareholders and uphold transparency in corporate activities. The primary goal is to protect investors' interests and maintain adherence to legal obligations within the corporate sector.

news.headline: Seabourn offers luxurious Northern Europe cruises in 2025 season, featuring castles and fjords from May to August.
news.summary: In Seattle on February 13, 2025, Seabourn, a top provider of ultra-luxury cruises and expedition trips, has announced a remarkable selection of Northern Europe routes for the upcoming summer cruise season in 2025. Between May and August 2025, Seabourn Sojourn is set to set sail on a variety of...

news.headline: Shentel adds high-speed gigabit internet to 5,000 homes in Shenandoah County, expanding reliable broadband services.
news.summary: In the town of Edinburg, Virginia, Shenandoah Telecommunications Company, also known as Shentel and listed on Nasdaq as SHEN, has expanded its high-speed gigabit internet service to around 5,000 more households in Shenandoah County. This move is part of their initiative to increase connectivity and they have further plans to extend this service to more homes in the area.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates ENFN, AZPN, HEES, NEUE on behalf of shareholders for securities law violations.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, announced its examination of various companies for potential infringements of federal securities laws and fiduciary duty breaches towards shareholders. Among the companies under scrutiny is Enfusion, Inc. (NYSE: ENFN), pertaining to its sale transaction.

news.headline: FirstFarms received notice of conversion of DKK 89.1M convertible bond to 1.1M shares by Constantinsborg A/S, owned by Heartland A/S.
news.summary: Today, FirstFarms A/S was informed by Constantinsborg A/S about the conversion of a convertible bond worth DKK 89,100,000 along with accrued interest. The bond was initially established on 29 February 2024 between the two parties. Following the conversion, the loan amount will be turned into DKK 1,100,000 shares in FirstFarms, with each share having a nominal value of DKK 10. It is important to note that the Lender, which is Constantinsborg A/S, is ultimately owned and operated by Heartland A/S.

news.headline: Northern Oil and Gas projects 131-132 MBoe production/day for Q4, with $231-232M capex; CEO optimistic for 2025 growth.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. provided updates on their fourth-quarter 2024 operations and outlined guidance for 2025. The company anticipates a daily production range of 131.0–132.0 thousand barrels of oil equivalent (MBoe) for the fourth quarter, aligning with the higher end of their annual production forecast. They made elective Ground Game and leasehold acquisitions amounting to $27 million in the quarter. Projected capital expenditures for the same period, excluding non-budgeted transactions, are estimated to be between $231 million and $232 million.Nick O’Grady, CEO of NOG, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance in 2024, noting over 25% production growth despite challenges that affected production towards the end of the year and into 2025. He remains confident about the company's future prospects.Looking ahead to 2025, Northern Oil and Gas foresees a daily production range of 130.0–135.0 MBoe. This update and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions to report Q4 & FY 2024 financial results on Feb 26; conference call at 2pm Pacific.
news.summary: Today, Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: KTOS), a technology company specializing in defense, national security, and global markets, stated that it intends to release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 post-market closure on Wednesday, February 26th. A conference call analyzing the company's performance and financial status will commence at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day.

news.headline: Vero Fiber secures $240 million credit facility for network growth, acquisitions in fiber-to-the-home market.
news.summary: VFN Holdings, Inc (Vero) headquartered in Boulder, Colorado, announced on February 13, 2025, that they have secured a $240 million committed debt facility. This influx of capital is set to drive the expansion of success-based fiber networks, bolster the growth of the fiber-to-the-home market, and facilitate the acquisition of complementary telecom infrastructure businesses. Vero aims to utilize this financial backing to strengthen its position in the market and capitalize on emerging opportunities in the telecommunications sector.

news.headline: HHRD has given $12M aid to Gaza since Oct 2023, $7M cash assistance, $5M provisions in humanitarian crisis.
news.summary: In Southfield, Michigan on February 13, 2025, Helping Hand for Relief and Development (HHRD) has delivered assistance worth $12 million to Gaza since the conflict began in October 2023. The aid package consists of $7 million in direct cash aid and $5 million in essential provisions, benefitting...

news.headline: Battery separator films market expected to reach $5.18 billion by 2031, with current value at $3.559 billion.
news.summary: The Battery Separator Films Market is categorized by type into Dry Method and Wet Method, and by application into Consumer Electronics, Power Vehicle, Electric Power Storage, and Industrial. In BANGALORE, India, on February 13, 2025, the global market for Battery Separator Films was reported to have reached a value of USD 3,559 million.

news.headline: Investigation by Halper Sadeh LLC on TURN, AMPS, SLRN for possible violations, fiduciary breaches to shareholders.
news.summary: A New York-based law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, has commenced investigations on several companies for potential breaches of the federal securities laws and fiduciary duties towards shareholders. Among the companies under scrutiny is 180 Degree Capital Corp., listed on NASDAQ. This investigation comes in light of potential violations that may impact shareholders. Further details on the investigation and its findings will be disclosed as the case progresses.

news.headline: Family Resource Home Care acquired Beneficial In-Home Care, Inc., one of Eastern Washington's largest home care providers.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 13, 2025, Family Resource Home Care, which is owned by Great Point Partners, revealed the purchase of Beneficial In-Home Care, Inc. Located in Eastern Washington, Beneficial is recognized as one of the largest home care providers in the region. This acquisition marks a significant step for Family Resource as they expand their reach in the industry. The specifics of the deal, including the financial details and potential impact on the market, were not disclosed to the public.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates PLYA, IVAC, NETD for securities law violations.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm focusing on investor rights, has initiated investigations into several companies regarding potential infringements of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V. (NASDAQ: [stock ticker]) is among the companies under scrutiny. The investigation aims to determine if the companies have violated any laws or failed in their duties towards shareholders.

news.headline: Gabelli Multimedia Trust reaffirms 10% distribution policy, declares $0.22/share for Q1 2025, payable on March 24, to record shareholders on Mar 17.
news.summary: In Rye, New York, on February 13, 2025, the Board of Directors of The Gabelli Multimedia Trust Inc. (NYSE:GGT) confirmed its 10% distribution policy by announcing a cash distribution of $0.22 per share. This distribution will be paid out on March 24, 2025, to common stock shareholders who are recorded as of March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Chainalysis introduces Asset Seizure Certification to help law enforcement tackle crypto crime, offering skills for effective asset seizure.
news.summary: Chainalysis has launched the Asset Seizure Certification program aimed at providing law enforcement officials with the necessary expertise to successfully seize cryptocurrency assets. This initiative is designed to help tackle the complexities surrounding modern financial crimes. The program equips participants with essential skills and knowledge to navigate the digital asset landscape and combat illicit activities. By gaining expertise in seizing crypto assets, law enforcement agencies can better address financial crimes involving virtual currencies.

news.headline: DeepSeek-R1 boosts GPU kernel creation with inference time scaling, optimizing AI model performance by efficiently managing resources.
news.summary: The DeepSeek-R1 model by NVIDIA implements inference-time scaling to enhance GPU kernel generation, thereby boosting performance in AI models. This optimization efficiently handles computational resources during inference, leading to significant improvements in overall efficiency.

news.headline: 28 counterparties take $67.820b at the Fed reverse repo operation.
StepStone Group launching ELTIF in Europe, converting Lux funds to UCI Part II structures.
news.summary: StepStone has transitioned its existing funds in Luxembourg to compliant UCI Part II structures. This decision involves converting a significant number of funds to align with regulatory standards. The move signifies StepStone's commitment to adapting to industry requirements and ensuring compliance with Lux regulations.

news.headline: Khurana from Wellington discusses global fixed income on Bloomberg, focusing on macro trends.
Shelby County Federal Credit Union appoints Raffael Crockett as CEO to boost growth and financial stability.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee on February 13, 2025, Shelby County Federal Credit Union announced the appointment of Raffael (Ralph) Crockett as the new Chief Executive Officer. Crockett, who brings over thirty years of credit union experience, is set to lead the organization towards greater financial stability and success. This move marks a significant shift in leadership for the credit union as it looks towards a promising future under Crockett's guidance.

news.headline: Global acne drugs market expected to reach USD 4.59 billion by 2030, with a market value of USD 3.61 billion in 2023.
news.summary: The market for acne drugs is divided by type into injection acne drugs and external acne drugs, with applications targeted towards teenagers and adults. In Bangalore, India, as of February 13, 2025, the global acne drugs market was valued at approximately USD 3616.6 million in 2023. It is projected to reach a revised size in the future, indicating a significant growth trend in the industry.

news.headline: Endeavour Mining received a notification from Blackrock Inc. about its interests in the company as of 12 Feb 2025.
news.summary: Endeavour Mining plc has been notified by Blackrock, Inc. on 13 February 2025 about their interests in the Company as of 12 February 2025. This notification pertains to the ownership stake or shares held by Blackrock, Inc. in the Company, indicating the extent of their investment in the mining firm. The disclosure is important for stakeholders and investors to understand the shareholding pattern and potential influence of a major financial player like Blackrock, Inc. on the operations and decisions of Endeavour Mining plc. The specific numbers or percentage of shares held by Blackrock, Inc. have not been disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens new luxury home community, Hearthfield, with 54 home sites in Collegeville, PA; Sales Center now open. #RealEstate #LuxuryHomes
news.summary: In Collegeville, Pennsylvania, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the nation’s top luxury home builder, revealed the launch of its latest community, Hearthfield. Situated in Collegeville, Hearthfield comprises 54 single-family home sites, uniquely designed with each home positioned on a cul-de-sac. The Sales Center and model home can be visited at 304 Grayson Court in Collegeville.

news.headline: Outrig acquires 2 RV storage facilities in California, expanding its portfolio to 14 properties nationwide.
news.summary: In Oakley, California, on February 13, 2025, Outrig has increased its national storage holdings from 12 to 14 properties. This expansion came through the purchase of two top-tier RV storage facilities in California. The acquisitions include Oakley Executive RV and Boat Storage located in the Bay Area, and All Valleys RV Storage. This move signifies a significant growth for Outrig in the storage sector, boosting their presence in the region.

news.headline: Penske Automotive Group beats Q4 earnings with $3.54 EPS, $7.72B sales (up 6% YoY), 3% increase in car deliveries.
news.summary: Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE:PAG) saw its shares rise on Thursday following its recent report. In the fourth quarter, the company achieved adjusted earnings per share of $3.54, surpassing expectations of $3.29 per share. Quarterly sales totaled $7.72 billion, marking a 6% increase from the previous year and exceeding analyst estimates of $7.58 billion. The delivery of new and used retail automotive units rose by 3%, while retail automotive same-store revenue experienced a 5% growth. New vehicle sales were up by 7%, used vehicle sales increased by 1%, finance and insurance saw a 3% decline, and service and parts revenue also rose.

news.headline: Trump memo on reciprocal tariffs to mention Brazil ethanol tariffs - Fox News.
Global environmental sensing market collects data on air, water, soil, weather and climate to aid sustainability.
news.summary: "Data from environmental sensing and monitoring technologies, which utilize sensors and satellites to collect information on air, water, soil, weather, and climate, offer real-time insights for tracking pollution, natural disasters, and ecosystem health. These technologies play a crucial role in supporting sustainability, public health, and climate action efforts."

news.headline: HR Advisory Firm McLean & Company emphasizes HR's role in maximizing social media benefits for organizations through better use of technology.
news.summary: A recent update from McLean & Company, a leading global HR research and advisory firm, emphasizes the significance of maximizing technology utilization, particularly through social media, to effectively achieve organizational objectives. The expertise of HR professionals plays a crucial role in harnessing the power of social media to optimize performance and meet key business priorities.

news.headline: Moleculin Biotech raises $5.8M through warrant exercise. Late-stage pharma firm targeting tumors and viruses.
news.summary: Houston, Texas - On February 13, 2025, Moleculin Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBRX) disclosed partnerships, positioning it as a leading pharmaceutical entity specializing in challenging tumor and virus treatments. The Company's recent agreements exhibit its commitment to advancing therapeutic options for complex medical conditions.

news.headline: SQDC's Q3 fiscal 2024-2025: Comprehensive income $40.5 million, tax revenues $72.6 million, remittance to govts $113.1 million.
news.summary: In the third quarter of the fiscal year ending on January 4, 2025, the Société québécoise du cannabis (SQDC) recorded comprehensive income of $40.5 million, compared to $33.0 million in the same period the previous year. Tax revenues from consumer and excise taxes generated by SQDC's operations reached $72.6 million, with $51.2 million directed to the provincial government and $21.1 million to the federal government. In total, SQDC will remit $113.1 million to both levels of government, with $92.0 million allocated to the Quebec treasury for reinvestment, primarily in cannabis-related prevention efforts and research. Overall sales for the quarter amounted to $235.9 million, showing an increase from $201.6 million.

news.headline: Zebra Tech's Q4 earnings show revenue surged 32% to $1.33 billion, exceeding estimates, CEO credits strong retail demand.
news.summary: Zebra Technologies Corp (NASDAQ:ZBRA) recently announced their Q4 financial results. The mobile computing company reported a significant sales increase of 32.2% to $1.33 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $1.32 billion. Additionally, Zebra disclosed adjusted earnings of $4.00 per share, which exceeded expectations of $3.94 per share. Despite the positive results, the stock price experienced a decline post-report. Both of Zebra's main business segments, namely Enterprise Visibility & Mobility, also demonstrated substantial growth during this period. For further details, you can access the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US 30 Year Bond Auction
US 30-Year Bond High Yield Actual 4.748% (Forecast -, Previous 4.913%)
US 30-Year Bond Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.330 (Forecast -, Previous 2.520)
Cornerstone Research promotes nine senior staff to VP and principal roles, strengthening expertise in economic consulting.
news.summary: In a recent development, Cornerstone Research, a prominent economic and financial consulting firm, has elevated a total of nine senior staff members to the positions of vice president and principal. This decision spans various practices and industries within the company. The announcement was made in San Francisco on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: Tofu secures $12M Series A funding from SignalFire and others for martech platform targeting enterprise GTM teams.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in San Francisco, Tofu, a comprehensive AI platform catering to B2B marketing teams, disclosed securing $12 million through Series A funding. SignalFire spearheaded the investment round, joined by other key contributors including HubSpot Ventures, Tau Ventures, Correlation Ventures, Alumni.

news.headline: Regal Cineworld Group appoints Adam Rymer as Chief Commercial Officer – US. Rymer brings 20+ years of experience.
news.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee on February 13, 2025, Regal Cineworld Group, a prominent worldwide theater operator, unveiled the selection of Adam Rymer as the inaugural Chief Commercial Officer for the US. Rymer, a highly regarded C-level executive with over 20 years of experience, is set to oversee commercial operations for the company in the US.

news.headline: Soter Insure secures Series A funding led by Galaxy to enhance digital asset insurance solutions. ABU DHABI, UAE, Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: Various prominent companies, including Brevan Howard Digital, Karatage, Token Bay, and Pharsalus, have teamed up to support Soter's initiative in offering specialized insurance solutions for the digital asset industry. The collaboration aims to address the growing demand for innovative insurance products within the sector. The partnership was announced in Abu Dhabi, UAE on February 13, 2025. Soter Insure, the insurance provider spearheading the mission, aims to cater to the unique needs of the digital asset market and ensure comprehensive coverage for businesses operating in this space.

news.headline: DoubleLine Research compares Microsoft Corp. debt to U.S. Treasuries in new report by Portfolio Manager Mariya Entina.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on February 13, 2025, Portfolio Manager Mariya Entina from DoubleLine Capital released a research paper comparing the creditworthiness and future prospects of bonds from Microsoft Corp. to those issued by the U.S. government. The study, conducted by CFA® and CPA, evaluated key financial metrics to analyze the bonds' performance, shedding light on important figures and trends within the investment-grade bond market.

news.headline: The Charlie Cart Project launches podcast celebrating community wins around food; marks 10th anniversary.
news.summary: Celebrating its 10th anniversary, The Charlie Cart Project (TCCP) based in Berkeley, California, has introduced a podcast to commemorate the occasion. The podcast, titled #CharlieCartPodcast, features inspiring tales of food heroes impacting children and future generations through diverse food education methods. Hosted by renowned documentarian Kelly Duane de la Vega and executive produced by TCCP’s executive director Carolyn Federman, The Charlie Cart Podcast showcases these initiatives. The project aims to shed light on the importance of food education for kids.

news.headline: Tim Ryan of Citi joins Battelle's Board of Directors, bringing his tech expertise. Joined in 2024, he has driven firm's tech and legacy teams' processes.
news.summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio - Battelle made public the addition of Tim Ryan to its Board of Directors. Ryan, who currently holds the position of Head of Technology and Business Enablement at Citi, officially joined the board. His arrival took effect immediately. Ryan's tenure at Citi since June 2024 has seen him lead the Technology and Legacy Franchise divisions. He has been instrumental in streamlining and updating processes across the organization. In addition to his board role, Ryan is a key member of Citi's Executive Management Team. Prior to his current role, Ryan held notable leadership positions, including a two-term appointment.

news.headline: Treasury WI 30y yield 4.736% before $25 billion auction.
FOX Nation to premiere "The Tides That Bind: Inside Alabama Football" on Feb 19, following team post Nick Saban.
news.summary: A brand-new docuseries titled "The Tides That Bind: Inside Alabama" is set to premiere on FOX Nation on February 19th. This series will provide an inside look at the University of Alabama's football team as they navigate their first season following the departure of renowned head coach Nick Saban. The documentary will offer multiple parts and is anticipated to offer an exclusive behind-the-scenes perspective on the team's journey.

news.headline: Cherry Bekaert report on 2024 PE market shows renewed optimism for M&A with key developments. Optimism for 2025 outlook.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on February 13, 2025, Cherry Bekaert (referred to as "the Firm") published its yearly year-end Private Equity Industry Report, focusing on key occurrences that influenced the private investment sector in 2024. The report showcases a resurgence of positivity within the private equity (PE) domain.

news.headline: FBI prevented $285M loss from crypto scams targeting romance and “pig butchering” victims in US.
news.summary: The US Department of Justice has taken action in response to cases involving victims of romance and "pig butchering" scams related to cryptocurrency. The department's intervention came after identifying individuals who had fallen victim to these schemes.
